hypothesis: On GER40 M15, naive donchian breakouts lose to noise (gen0 PF=1.00); requiring a pullback-retest of the broken ATR-breakout level within a trending ADX regime filters false breaks and lifts PF above 2.0.

entry.long: close > atr_breakout_level_upper(period=20, atr_mult=1.0) on bar N; then wait up to 6 bars for pullback within 0.25*ATR of broken level; enter long on next bar close above level

exit.sl: 1.0 * ATR(14) below retest low (long) / above retest high (short)

notes: Explicit pivot from gen0 dead branch (naive donchian breakout on DAX, PF=1.00). Adds ADX trend gate + pullback-retest requirement. Dead branch banned: plain donchian breakout without retest.
